patch.value: Context relevance signal feature store: derived recency, graph, claim, risk, deadline, knowledge-density, and semantic-match signals
Build the SDK-facing derived signal layer that feeds adaptive context ranking without scanning every item file.

SDK exposes stable signal extraction primitives; signals cover recency/activity density, dependency proximity, claim/focus state, priority/risk/deadline pressure, knowledge density, author affinity, and semantic similarity; feature reads are index-backed via pm-801d; signal snapshots are deterministic for a fixed workspace; missing optional indexes degrade gracefully with explicit metadata.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate check: searched all statuses for context relevance scorer/signal extraction/feature store; only parent pm-4k6b and historical search-ranking work matched, so this is the non-duplicate signal-layer implementation slice.
